questions.q: In April 2026, voters in which state fired half of their town council just a week after the council approved a new data center project?
Following an arson attack on OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home in April 2026, prosecutors revealed the suspect possessed a 'kill list' targeting executives in which field?

Highlighting a workplace divide over AI, a 2026 Guardian report notes that while bosses say AI boosts productivity, workers complain they are drowning in low-quality AI-generated content known by what term?
In an effort to 'streamline operations', which major entertainment company began laying off 1,000 employees in April 2026 under the direction of CEO Josh D’Amaro?
In April 2026, Google announced that starting in June, it will begin punishing websites that employ which deceptive user experience tactic?
